text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after the Unity Cup and the Twinkle
Series have both wrapped up, Director Akikawa
summons our team.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well done on getting through all the ups and
downs life has thrown at you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And more importantly, well done on your
magnificent performance in the Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, it is unfortunate that you could not seize
victory.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, your teamwork was impeccable, and
your trainer believed in you right to the very end!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I think the earnest feelings you hold in your
hearts really helped save a certain other team
and their trainer!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to congratulate you on your hard work.
Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Huh? We saved a team? I don't remember doin'
anything like that.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Welp! All's well that ends well! Right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Training as a team was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Agreed! I feel like my luck was boosted just by
being with you all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I feel the same. I'm so glad I joined.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Very good! It brings me much bliss to hear you
enjoyed yourselves. I'll be looking forward to your
future performance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make a promise with <chrname> to
work hard and live up to Director Akikawa's
expectations.
